creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
(In reply to David Schlachter from comment #2)
You're welcome :)

Normally something like USE_LDCONFIG=yes should be added to the Makefile. And this IS the case with both samba413 and samba416.  This variable is used in /usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk, though how its used is opaque to me.  And /sbin/ldconfig is in the same location on 13.2S and 14.0R and only links to libc.so so that's not the problem. :-)

For the moment, I'd suspect something within your environment though unless you're using MAC protections I don't really see how; bsd.port.mk remains a candidate. I hope to install 416 on FBSD14R this weekend. Will advise.
